text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's training is finished for the day. Just when
we're about to part ways...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whew! That was a ton of runnin'! Look at all this
sweat!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I have to keep going... One more!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm definitely going to be number one!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Scarlet...
choice_data_list: Why don't we call it a day?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Not yet... Lemme run a bit more!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm callin' it quits now after seeing
Scarlet going so hard!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I won't get anywhere if I don't practice twice as
much!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not it... It just wouldn't sit right with me
if I did nothing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If it's guts we're talkin', no way am I losin' to
Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So, Trainer, let's go... beyond the limit!
choice_data_list: All right! Let's keep it up!
I think that might be going too far.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I knew it! You really get me, partner!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna blow her away so badly...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: She'll never know what hit her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Holding to her word, Vodka keeps on pushing
forward, no matter how tired she gets.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Too bad! There's no turnin' back now! I gotta do
what it takes to get to where I gotta get!
choice_data_list:
You won't be able to get anywhere if you pass
out.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Urgh. That's true...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
If I pass out along the way, she could leave me in
the dust...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I wanna push ahead, if my
body can't keep up, then what's the point?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Fine. I'll make ya look good and call it a day here.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But don't forget—limit isn't part of my vocabulary. Got it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Vodka agrees to finish her training
for today.
